source.name: nanally_character_data_pack.json
notes: Prepared data pack is the current source of truth for Nanally factual data.
Site-authored build, team, and console guide data is merged separately and marked site-authored.

identity.name: Nanally
identity.title: The Ichi-daime of the Coluccis — currently seeking new recruits!

stats.growthNotes: PDF states approximate growth per level: HP +105.59, ATK +4, DEF +6.

skills.name: Colucci Secret Skill

descriptionBlocks.title: Basic Attack: Colucci Secret Skill
descriptionBlocks.content: Bares her fangs and brandishes her claws, performing up to 5 consecutive attacks, dealing Anima DMG. Dodging does not interrupt the combo.

descriptionBlocks.title: Basic Attack: Heavy Hitter!
descriptionBlocks.content: Triggers by holding Basic Attack. Performs up to 3 powerful attacks, dealing Anima DMG. Chains after Critical Riposte and the 1st, 2nd, 3rd, and 5th attacks of Colucci Secret Skill. Dodging does not interrupt the combo.

descriptionBlocks.title: Basic Attack: Colucci Secret Gundo
descriptionBlocks.content: Enters aim mode, dealing 1 instance of single-target Anima DMG to the enemy in the crosshair.

descriptionBlocks.title: Basic Attack: Grand Entrance!
descriptionBlocks.content: Swings her claws in the air and plunges, dealing 1 instance of Anima DMG to an area upon impact. Increases DMG based on fall height, up to 100%.

descriptionBlocks.title: Critical Riposte: Can't Touch This!
descriptionBlocks.content: Triggers when using Colucci Secret Skill after a Critical Dodge. Charges toward the target at full speed, planting one hand on the ground, delivering a roundhouse kick that deals 1 instance of Anima DMG to an area, and reducing Break.

skills.flavorText: Said to be a secret combat technique passed down in the Coluccis, though it clearly incorporates many street-fighting elements from Hethereau.

skills.name: Colucci Howling Technique

descriptionBlocks.title: Colucci Howling Technique
descriptionBlocks.content: Hehe, surprise time! Deals 5 instances of Anima DMG to surrounding enemies and wraps herself in Anima Esper Ability, gaining the Ichi-daime's Authority effect. Lasts 12s or until Nanally is switched out. Ends Ichi-daime's Authority early when recast.

descriptionBlocks.title: Ichi-daime's Authority
descriptionBlocks.content: Increases Nanally's CRIT DMG by 30%. Nanally can ignore gravity and walk on any surface.

skills.flavorText: Mint tried to learn this move from Nanally, but the moment she saw that Nanally's hair went rough, curved, split, and knotted, she gave up the idea. Adler is not with her in the Bureau of Anomaly Control to take care of her hair, after all.

descriptionBlocks.title: Colucci Ultimate Technique
descriptionBlocks.content: I'm way stronger than them! Deals 7 instances of Anima DMG immediately to surrounding enemies and summons Underboss to fight alongside her. Creates a small pull effect on surrounding enemies with Nanally's attacks while Underboss is active, and coordinates with all of Nanally's attacks to launch strikes, dealing Anima DMG that also counts as follow-up attack damage.

skills.name: Justice from Above

descriptionBlocks.title: Justice from Above
descriptionBlocks.content: Time to get serious! Charges with a spinning motion, delivering a kick and dealing 1 instance of Anima DMG to an area.

skills.flavorText: Got a problem? Come find Nanally - I've got you covered!

passives.name: More Than Passionate
passives.description: Blossom Enhancement: Fires 10 Vita Pistils with Vita Bud, reducing the interval between each shot to 1s.
passives.flavorText: The First Rule of Gang Wars: “Watch your back.”

passives.name: Fair Duel
passives.description: Applies 1 follow-up attack to a single enemy, dealing Anima DMG of 60% ATK whenever any ally deals 1 instance of Esper Cycle DMG while Nanally is in Ichi-daime's Authority state. DMG Ratio scales with Basic Attack skill level, reaching 129.5% at Lv11. Triggers once every 2s.
passives.flavorText: Hey, hey, hey! The duel has already started.

levels.description: Nanally increases dish prices by 0.2 Fons for each Main Dish tag on dishes.
Nanally reduces ingredient consumption rate by 1%.
In Owner's Selection, hitting customers with the hammer grants 115% of the current dish price.
Nanally reduces ingredient consumption rate by 1%.
Nanally increases dish prices by 0.3 Fons for every 2 Main Dish tags on dishes.

awakenings.name: Gang Formation
awakenings.description: Grants Nanally 2.5 Ultimate Energy for each follow-up attack she performs. Triggers at most once every 1s.

awakenings.name: Call Me the Boss
awakenings.description: Applies 1 follow-up attack to a single enemy, dealing Anima DMG of 50% ATK whenever Nanally deals damage to an enemy while in Ichi-daime's Authority state. DMG Ratio scales with Basic Attack skill level, reaching 107.9% at Lv11. Triggers once per second.

awakenings.name: Followers Everywhere
awakenings.description: Increases Nanally's ATK by 2% for each follow-up attack she performs, up to 20%. Disappears when Nanally leaves the battlefield or exits combat.

awakenings.name: Because We're Family
awakenings.description: Extends the duration of Ichi-daime's Authority state to 15s, and further extends it to 20s when out of combat.

awakeningBonuses.name: Colucci Secrets - Part 1
awakeningBonuses.description: Increases the skill level of Colucci Secret Skill, Colucci Howling Technique, and Colucci Ultimate Technique by 1.

intel: Nanally, the queen of Bridge Crossings, is known far and wide for causing trouble and chasing big family dreams.
When not on quests, Nanally spends most of her time wandering around trying to revive the Colucci Family.
Nanally is not a cat, she is a tiger.

personalItems.name: Ichi-daime's Badge
personalItems.description: A carefully cut tiger-shaped bottle cap, topaz blue plastic wrap, and one sturdy little safety pin.

personalItems.name: Nini's Adventures
personalItems.description: Nanally's favorite gang anime when she was a kid, and still her favorite now.

personalItems.name: Family Quotes Collection
personalItems.description: A collection of Nanally quotes and family slogans.

stories.title: Justice From Above
stories.summary: Childhood incidents where Nanally defended others and caused dramatic collateral damage.

stories.title: World Flip
stories.summary: A reversed spherical, magnetic-field-like world created by Genius Ichi-daime: Earth Flip.

quotes: Don't worry about my attitude, I'm tough as nails.
Fist to flesh, thunder and lightning! This is the romance of gang life!
Walking this path means constant encounters and farewells. I understand that.

buildNotes: Build recommendations are site-authored guide data preserved because the data pack does not provide exact weapon IDs, team IDs, or console layouts.
Data-pack guide stats confirm Nanally wants Anima DMG Bonus, CRIT DMG, ATK%, and CRIT Rate main stats with CRIT Rate, CRIT DMG, ATK%, DMG Bonus, and ATK sub stats.

activeTraits.name: Type II Specialization
activeTraits.reason: Equipped Type II module count is known to Build Planner.

remainingVerification: JP, KO, and CN voice actor strings should be checked against official localization because the prepared pack text is mojibake in this environment.
CRIT Rate 5% and CRIT DMG 50% are current site combat defaults pending official verification.
Missing skill levels between known Lv.1/Lv.6/Lv.7/Lv.13 rows must stay disabled until sourced.
Skins and voice lines remain future placeholders.

trivia: Her family name has Coluccis/Collins localization notes across Chinese, Japanese, and Korean.
The nickname also appears as the title of her Scarborough Fair banner.

guide.reviewSummary: Nanally is a field-time hungry Main DPS built around follow-up attacks and Anima damage. Her kit becomes dangerous when Ichi-daime's Authority and Underboss overlap: her basic attacks, follow-up triggers, and summoned Underboss can keep adding extra Anima hits. The tradeoff is that she wants uninterrupted field time. If she is forced off-field, loses her rhythm, or gets interrupted during her burst window, part of her damage setup has to be rebuilt.
pros: Strong damage when Ichi-daime's Authority and Underboss are active together.
Good Blossom/follow-up output by staying on field and repeating her rotation.
Straightforward rotation once the setup is understood.
Wall-walking utility is useful for exploration and shop-management bonuses.
cons: Wants a lot of uninterrupted field time.
Loses a significant part of her burst window if hit, interrupted, or swapped out.
Ichi-daime's Authority does not persist after switching out, so the setup has to be rebuilt.
